title: [circt-verilog][arcilator] `arcilator` fails to lower `llhd.constant_time` generated from simple SV delay (`#1`)

features.name: time delay in initial block
features.description: Code should include an initial block that uses a simple integer time delay (#N) to schedule a signal assignment at a later simulation time

features.name: output logic driven entirely from initial block
features.description: Code should include a module with output logic ports whose values are assigned exclusively inside an initial procedural block, with no always block or continuous assignment

features.name: display system task in initial block after time delay
features.description: Code should include a $display system task call inside an initial block that executes after a time delay, printing a completion message
